# RCSService.Business.Menu.Content

**Enumeration**

Enumeration defining the contents of menu.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Content
```

## Determining content type

- **RCSService.Business.Menu.Content.submenu(_:)**: A sub menu.
- **RCSService.Business.Menu.Content.suggestion(_:)**: Suggestion (action or reply).
- **RCSService.Business.Suggestion**: Enumeration representing a suggestion from a business.

## Accessing menu properties

- **title**: Title for menu.
- **contents**: Array of menu contents.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
